title: Revenue Quality Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger revenue quality foundations judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Revenue Quality Foundations is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Revenue Quality Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good revenue quality foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Revenue Quality Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
